Brilliance Back to Brilliance

Intelligence, accessible.

Brilliance — the operating intelligence for brand & life.

Same platform. Same memory. Same work. New name and new surfaces. All plans include a free trial. Early adopters lock in their price for life.

Solo
Essentials
$9/mo

Everything you need to get started with AI powered brand and life intelligence.

  • 1 Brand profile (Brand Intelligence)
  • 1 LifeAI profile (Life Intelligence)
  • Chat with all AI agents
  • Library and Memory
  • Pulse goal tracking
  • Rhythm scheduling
  • Basic Automations
  • Community support
First 100 · 50% Off
Founder
Full Access
$59/mo
$29.50/mo forever

The complete Brilliance experience. Full platform access for brands and life.

  • Everything in Solo, plus:
  • Up to 5 Brand and LifeAI profiles
  • Studio operations & Split-Pane Workspace
  • Folio · Studio at Work mode
  • Full automations & Agent chat
  • Mail & social publishing
  • Pulse, Time Ribbon, Identity
  • Thought Board (Pinboard + Constellation)
  • Notebook · Letter Series mode
  • Cloud sync across devices
  • Priority support

Auto applies code Founder100 at checkout. $29.50/mo locked for life as long as your subscription stays active.

First 100 · 50% Off
Premium
Professional
$79/mo
$39.50/mo forever

For power users and teams who need advanced features and dedicated support.

  • Everything in Founder, plus:
  • Up to 15 Brand and LifeAI profiles
  • Bloom — brand-content feed
  • Evolve — Educational Intelligence
  • Brand sharing and config export
  • Private onboarding session
  • 24/7 Priority support

Auto applies code Premier100 at checkout. $39.50/mo locked for life as long as your subscription stays active.

How It Works

Sign up and start your free trial. When your trial ends, continue at your locked-in price.

1

Choose Your Plan

Select the tier that fits your needs. Every plan includes a free trial.

2

Set Up Your Workspace

Configure your brands, connect your AI providers, and start building with intelligence.

3

Lock In Your Price

Early adopters keep their rate forever. Your price never increases as long as you stay subscribed.

Now Shipping

Now in Brilliance

RoweOS is now Brilliance. Same platform. New name, new namesake, and a long list of new surfaces shipped this release.

Brilli, the entity

A gold orb on chat with attending, thinking, and pleased states. Five forms: Celestial, Aura, Firefly, Light Signature, and the original Classic BLAKE.

Concierge Desk

What is active today, in one pill row above your chat input. Pulse goals, calendar, automations, Bloom, Evolve.

Focus Mode

⌘⇧F strips ambient chrome on any surface. One message, Brilli, input. Esc exits.

HistoryTime Ribbon

A scrubbing timeline of past conversations. Each marker is a moment. Resume or Branch from here.

StudioSplit-Pane

Run an operation with input on the left, live output streaming on the right.

FolioStudio at Work

Treats the active artifact as the centerpiece. Chat moves to a narrow right gutter.

NotebookLetter Series

Cream paper, narrow column, gold drop caps. Reversible. Your data stays the same.

Thought Board

A new surface. Pin moments from Chat, Notebook, or Studio. Pinboard grid plus Constellation 2D map.

Evolve preview

Educational Intelligence: Today, Practice, Translator, Verify, Skills. Multi-model quiz pipeline activates in v34.

AI API Keys

Bring your own keys and pay only for what you use. Or purchase pre-loaded keys from The Rowe Collection.

Anthropic
Claude
  • Sonnet 4.6
  • Opus 4.7
  • Haiku 4.5
OpenAI
ChatGPT
  • GPT-5.5
  • GPT-5.5 Pro
  • GPT-5.5 Thinking
  • GPT Image 2
Google
Gemini
  • Gemini 3.1 Pro
  • Deep Research
  • NanoBanana 3 Pro

Pay as you go. Purchase pre-loaded API keys and they will be delivered to your Brilliance account automatically on next login.

Brilliance AI

When you have all three AI providers configured, Brilliance AI automatically selects the best model for each task. Strategy, research, creative, operations - each request is routed to the model that performs best for that specific operation.

Brilliance

Brilliance · Brand & Life Intelligence Platform · by RoweOS.
